title: Cognitive Decline Is Not Inevitable — These Things Matter Most
description: You don't have to wait around for memory loss and brain fog; you can avoid them altogether.
content: Most of us have been taught to accept memory loss as an unavoidable part of getting older. Majid Fotuhi, M.D., a Harvard and Johns Hopkins-trained neurologist, brain health researcher, and author of … [+4119 chars]
de: Ein kognitiver Verfall ist nicht unvermeidlich – diese Dinge sind am wichtigsten. Sie müssen nicht auf Gedächtnisverlust und Gehirnnebel warten; Sie können sie ganz vermeiden.
en: Cognitive Decline Is Not Inevitable — These Things Matter Most. You don't have to wait around for memory loss and brain fog; you can avoid them altogether.
la: Cognitive Decline is not inevitable — Haec res Most. Non expectandum est circa memoriam damni et nebulae cerebri; omnino vitare potes.

title: 'The bus spun 180 degrees' in Ont. crash that sent students to hospital
description: A school bus carrying two students collided with a tractor-trailer in Huron East Tuesday morning. Police say heavy fog reduced visibility and are reminding drivers to use extra caution.
content:
Two students and two drivers suffered minor injuries after a school bus collided with a tractor-trailer Tuesday morning, east of Clinton, Ont. 
Ontario Provincial Police (OPP) say the crash happened… [+2745 chars]
de: „Der Bus drehte sich um 180 Grad“ in Ontario. Unfall, der Studenten ins Krankenhaus brachte. Ein Schulbus mit zwei Schülern kollidierte am Dienstagmorgen in Huron East mit einem Sattelschlepper. Die Polizei gibt an, dass starker Nebel die Sicht einschränkte und mahnt Autofahrer, besonders vorsichtig zu sein.
en: 'The bus spun 180 degrees' in Ont. crash that sent students to hospital. A school bus carrying two students collided with a tractor-trailer in Huron East Tuesday morning. Police say heavy fog reduced visibility and are reminding drivers to use extra caution.
